TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Murisaka ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Banrong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 148 buwan, 463 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 448 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 80%, Amis 4%, Tayan 3%, Paywan 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 7%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Murisaka hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Murisaka hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Murisaka hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Murisaka hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Murisaka hya' ga Gbayang. tay mkyahu' na Murisaka hya' ga Maribasi. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. khu skwan biru maki 2 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ muris~ɕaka ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βanroŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na muris~ɕaka ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na muris~ɕaka ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na muris~ɕaka ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na muris~ɕaka ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na muris~ɕaka ħjaʔ ɣa ɣβajaŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na muris~ɕaka ħjaʔ ɣa mariβas~ɕi. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. kħu s~ɕkwan βiru maki * kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Murisaka ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Banrong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 148 buwan, 463 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 448 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 80%, Amis 4%, Tayan 3%, Paywan 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 7%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Murisaka hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Murisaka hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Murisaka hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Murisaka hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Murisaka hya' ga Gbayang. tay mkyahu' na Murisaka hya' ga Maribasi. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. khu skwan biru maki 2 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ muris~ɕaka ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βanroŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na muris~ɕaka ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na muris~ɕaka ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na muris~ɕaka ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na muris~ɕaka ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na muris~ɕaka ħjaʔ ɣa ɣβajaŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na muris~ɕaka ħjaʔ ɣa mariβas~ɕi. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. kħu s~ɕkwan βiru maki * kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
